trails.name: WAIPOHATU WATERFALLS TRACK
trails.description: This is a rugged tramping track through rainforest up to two waterfalls. This track connects to Forest Walk Track.

trails.name: Matai Falls Walk
trails.description: Walk to the Matai Falls through regenerating podocarp and broadleaf forest.

trails.name: Catlins River Track
trails.description: An attractive, forest-lined river walk of that follows the Catlins River.

trails.name: Thisbe Valley Track
trails.description: Thisbe Valley Track leads through Catlins Conservation Park to McLennan Hut.

trails.name: Purakaunui Falls Walk
trails.description: Walk to the well known and often photographed Purakaunui Falls.

trails.name: Mclean Falls Walk
trails.description: Walk to the spectacular McLean Falls though a variety of forest and shrub types.

trails.name: Catlins River-Wisp Loop Track
trails.description: An attractive, forest-lined river walk of three sections that has several natural features and access to good fishing.

trails.name: Jacks Blowhole Track
trails.description: Walk to a spectacular blowhole with exploding waves and roaring sound effects.

trails.name: Nugget Point/Tokata walks
trails.description: Enjoy dramatic coastal views from the Tokata Lighthouse and spot seals, penguins and other seabirds on these short walks.

trails.name: Papatowai walks
trails.description: Explore the coastal area around Papatowai - where forest meets sea.

trails.name: Tautuku walks
trails.description: Three walks on and around the very scenic Tautuku Bay.

trails.name: Awakiki Bush Track
trails.description: An easy walk through lowland tōtara forest.

trails.name: Pounawea nature walks
trails.description: These short walks travel through a forest that is full of birdlife. It also travels along a sand spit that is home to wading birds.

trails.name: Kaka Point Bush Walk
trails.description: This is an easy bush walk in the Kaka Point Scenic Reserve that gives the impression that it is very remote, yet almost within the township of Kaka Point.

trails.name: Forest Walk
trails.description: The Forest Walk is a wheelchair accessible track which winds through native bush and crosses the Waipohatu stream. It connects to the Waipohatu Waterfalls Track.

trails.name: McNally Track
trails.description: The walkway is located near the cemetery on Cemetery Road, on the outskirts of the town of Milton.
